creator: ben@acustat.org
text:
Kernel panic on default boot from iso.
- panic: running without device atpic requires a local APIC

How-To-Repeat: 
1) I create an new VM for installing FreeBSD on. VM stats 512 MB Memory and 8 GB HD.  No changes to default settings, but have also tried with changing net work to bridged device with same result.

2) After vm create is done.  Turn on and select FreeBSD-10-Alpha2.iso to boot from.

3) Select Normal (default option) boot from FreeBSD boot menu.

4) panic response starts at:
     - panic: running without device atpic requires a local APIC
